details.note: Designed Phases 1 and 2 of Safe/Degraded Mode architecture: 13 fixes across 16 modified and 4 new files. Phase 1 (Init Flow Restructuring): PGlite protection, sidecar error classification, main process safe mode routing, safe mode UI renderer. Phase 2 (Service Health Registry): HealthRegistry Effect service, extended /global/health endpoint, component health reporting, plugin crash counters + quarantine.
